nodes.context: Criminal association in Canada, Australia and Italy related to the 'Ndrangheta, involved in drug trafficking and money laundering.
Mafia-type organization in Calabria, Italy, involved in global cocaine business and money laundering.
One of the biggest and most important clans of the 'Ndrangheta, based in Siderno, involved in global cocaine business and money laundering.
Crime family based in Hamilton, Ontario, Canada, with close contacts to the Siderno Group.
Crime family based in Montreal, Canada, with close contacts to the Siderno Group.
Hamilton-based crime family involved in bombings and drug trafficking, had conflict with the Siderno Group.
Clan within the Siderno Group in the Greater Toronto Area, involved in drug trafficking and extortion.
Clan within the Siderno Group in the Greater Toronto Area, allegedly headed by Angelo Figliomeni.

edges.context: The Siderno Group is related to the 'Ndrangheta, a Mafia-type organization in Calabria.
The Commisso 'ndrina is one of the 'Ndrangheta's biggest and most important clans.
Michele Racco maintained close contacts with the Luppino crime family in Hamilton.
Michele Racco maintained close contacts with the Cotroni crime family in Montreal.
The Musitano crime family orchestrated the murder of Domenic Racco of the Siderno Group due to a drug trade dispute.
The Coluccio clan is part of the Siderno Group in the Greater Toronto Area.
The Figliomeni clan is part of the Siderno Group in the Greater Toronto Area.
